Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR compared to the time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR when the case previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that never involved any rejection versus cases that included at least one rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR across all process variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to be performed after Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful paths (ending in Payment Handled) versus paths that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after the completion of the immediately preceding approval activity (e.g., Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION, Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER, or Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants where the supervisor is also the budget owner versus variants where they are distinct roles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Request Payment and Payment Handled following Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR, as an indicator of downstream efficiency after final approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR relative to the submission timestamp, specifically in traces that contain Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER earlier in the sequence
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR measured from the moment the declaration enters the supervisor’s queue (implied by Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR) until final approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE (after a prior rejection by PRE_APPROVER) to subsequent Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR upon resubmission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that originated in 2017 compared to those from 2018
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'", 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'group_by': 'year'}"
